title: Switched to LED bulbs
description: Replace incandescent bulbs with LEDs to cut lighting energy use by 75%.

title: Installed a low-flow showerhead
description: Reduces water use by 30-50% per shower without affecting pressure.

title: Started composting
description: Composting food scraps reduces landfill methane emissions significantly.

title: Installed solar water heater
description: Solar water heating can offset 60-80% of water heating energy needs.

title: Switched to public transport
description: Regular public transport use reduces per-person CO2 by up to 2.5 tonnes/year.

title: Planted a tree
description: Each tree absorbs ~22 kg CO2 per year over its lifetime.

title: Reduced meat consumption (1 week)
description: Plant-based meals have 50-70% lower carbon footprint than meat-based ones.

title: Fixed all water leaks at home
description: A dripping tap wastes ~3,000 litres per year.

title: Carpooled for a month
description: Sharing a car ride halves per-person fuel consumption and emissions.

title: Switched to e-billing
description: Paperless billing saves trees and eliminates postal transport emissions.
